title: T-056 — Scheduler end-to-end flow and prototype label marker tests
prompt:
# T-056 — Scheduler end-to-end flow and prototype label marker tests

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §13.1 P1 checklist, §18 UI matrix, prototype-index-planning-ext.json.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Add cross-surface E2E and label marker proof for 95%+ readiness.

## Implementation contract
Tests should be data-driven from prototype-index-planning-ext.json and confirm P1 surfaces expose stable markers; P2 surfaces may be locked but must be intentionally represented.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add E2E coverage across run scheduler → Gantt → approve/override → matrix edit/import/publish → forecast upload and verify data-prototype-label markers.
pipeline_inputs.details: Closeout task proving prototype-index labels are implemented or explicitly feature-gated for P2. Uses labels from prototype-index-planning-ext.json as test data.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Seed WO data and active factory-release snapshots.
Approved assignment event remains compatible with runtime preflight.

acceptance_criteria: Given the scheduler E2E suite runs, then Run Scheduler → draft Gantt → approve/reject/override/reschedule paths pass with audit/outbox assertions.
Given prototype-index-planning-ext.json labels are enumerated, then every P1 surface has a matching data-prototype-label or explicit P2/locked exception.
Given matrix and forecast flows run, then import/validation/publish/upload states are asserted with no unresolved placeholder labels.
test_strategy: RED Playwright tests with seeded scheduler fixtures and prototype label enumeration.
Run pnpm playwright test --grep @scheduler and pnpm vitest run tests/scheduler.
risk_red_lines: Do not treat P2 gated labels as P1 failures.
Do not use D365 as a required seed dependency.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
